zamp.headline: AI employees that own outcomes end-to-end across your business
zamp.problem_claimed: You need full-time roles (marketing, sales, ops) but can't hire or scale fast enough
zamp.icp_description: Mid-market to enterprise companies ($10m+) evaluating digital workforce deployment
zamp.pricing: $25k-$75k pilot per AI employee, custom enterprise pricing
messaging_angles: AI employees replace human roles entirely
Own outcomes end-to-end like a person would
Deploy across every function (CS, eng, marketing, finance)
Sales-led deployment with demo and pilot
AI employees cost fraction of human salary
Perceive → Reason → Act → Hand off framework
what_they_dont_say: Self-serve onboarding or free entry point

oxygen.headline: GTM infrastructure engineered to 10x revenue — run your entire GTM from Claude Code
oxygen.problem_claimed: Go-to-market is too fragmented: separate tools for data, enrichment, sequences, CRM; AI coding agents need a durable GTM workspace
oxygen.icp_description: Technical founders, GTM engineers, small revenue teams using Claude Code/Codex
oxygen.pricing: Self-serve with free tier. Free → $99/mo → $249/mo → $749/mo → $2k/mo managed. No sales call needed.
messaging_angles: AI-native GTM workspace — database + enrichment + sequences + CRM
Built for Claude Code, Codex and MCP agents
Forward-deployed GTM engineer on enterprise accounts
One managed key replaces 50 API keys
